steps.description: Press the F1 key to open the command palette in Visual Studio Code, while viewing the "Preview README.md" file within the "MICROSOFT 365 AGENTS TOOLKIT" workspace.
Type the text 'Notifications: Clear All Notificatiions' into the Command Palette input box at the top of the Visual Studio Code interface.
Press the Enter key to select "Notifications: Clear All Notifications" in the VS Code command palette.
